title: Government Property Inspectors and Investigators
description: Investigate or inspect government property to ensure compliance with contract agreements and government regulations.

tasks.text: Prepare correspondence, reports of inspections or investigations, or recommendations for action.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine records, reports, or other documents to establish facts or detect discrepancies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect government property, such as construction sites or public housing, to ensure compliance with contract specifications or legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Investigate alleged license or permit violations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect manufactured or processed products to ensure compliance with contract specifications or legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collect, identify, evaluate, or preserve case evidence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Submit samples of products to government laboratories for testing, as required.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect government-owned equipment or materials in the possession of private contractors to ensure compliance with contracts or regulations or to prevent misuse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Investigate applications for special licenses or permits.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend legal or administrative action to protect government property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Testify in court or at administrative proceedings concerning investigation findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate with or assist law enforcement agencies in matters of mutual concern.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor investigations of suspected offenders to ensure that they are conducted in accordance with constitutional requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
